home.h1: Gustavsburg Cem Evi — modern, multilingual, organized.
home.p: This is V1: 3 languages, animations, event calendar, team page, public forms + an admin area with roles and audit logging.

card2.p: Editor/Admin manages content — everything is logged.

card3.p: Forms and content stored in a structured way.

calendar.p: All events are shown here. Changes happen in Admin.

gallery.p: Galleries can be active or archived. Admin manages items and sorting.

people.p: People with preview image, tasks and description.

member.p: Saved so it can be filtered and printed later.

funeral.p: Store wishes safely and edit later.

forms.hint: Note: Admin can review, filter and print submissions later.

admin.loginHint: Admin/Editor accounts are created in Supabase Auth.
admin.rolesHint: Viewer: read • Editor: create/update • Admin: delete + audit logs
admin.title: Title
admin.name: Name
admin.auditHint: Audit log shows who changed/deleted what and when.
admin.galleryItemsNote: V1 shows galleries. V2 adds per-item uploads & ordering (Storage).
